prompt: Extract ONLY a JSON object with keys: vendor_name, invoice_number, invoice_date, due_date, currency, subtotal, tax, total, bill_to, line_items. line_items must be an array of objects with description, quantity, unit_price, amount. Use numbers for money. If a field is absent, use null. Do not include prose.

inputs.name: invoice.txt
inputs.content:
INVOICE
Seller: Northstar Data Tools LLC
Bill To: Meridian Foods Inc.
Invoice No: NS-2026-0441
Date Issued: 07/03/2026
Payment Terms: Net 30
Currency: USD

Items:
1. Data cleanup package | Qty 2 | Unit $1,250.00 | Line $2,500.00
2. Migration support | Qty 6 | Unit $175.00 | Line $1,050.00
3. Discount - partner credit | Qty 1 | Unit -$300.00 | Line -$300.00

Subtotal: $3,250.00
Sales Tax: $260.00
Amount Due: $3,510.00
Note: PO number was requested but not provided.

grading.guidance: Gold: vendor_name Northstar Data Tools LLC; invoice_number NS-2026-0441; invoice_date 2026-07-03 if interpreting MM/DD/YYYY from US-style invoice; due_date 2026-08-02 from Net 30; currency USD; subtotal 3250.00; tax 260.00; total 3510.00; bill_to Meridian Foods Inc.; 3 line items including negative discount amount -300. PO number absent and should not be added because not requested. Penalize prose, wrong vendor/bill-to reversal, missing negative discount, string money, or wrong due date.

calibrationAnchors.answer: {"vendor_name":"Northstar Data Tools LLC","invoice_number":"NS-2026-0441","invoice_date":"2026-07-03","due_date":"2026-08-02","currency":"USD","subtotal":3250,"tax":260,"total":3510,"bill_to":"Meridian Foods Inc.","line_items":[{"description":"Data cleanup package","quantity":2,"unit_price":1250,"amount":2500},{"description":"Migration support","quantity":6,"unit_price":175,"amount":1050},{"description":"Discount - partner credit","quantity":1,"unit_price":-300,"amount":-300}]}
